utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check full specification with costs: Each sub-item under health_coverage has a cost listed; although multiple line items exist, the category requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—these are present with costs, so fully specified. Property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs; it lists 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (Home Content)' with cost and related protections with costs—meets requirement. Travel_coverage: 'travel insurance with costs' is present with base and add-on, both with costs—meets requirement. Additional_services: has an enhancement service with cost—meets requirement. Total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown—present. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item in the final coverage plan to the corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings. For health coverage, 'EliteCare Premium Plan (Physical Health Top-up)' aligns with 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, and 'EliteCare Premium Plan (Mental Health)' aligns with 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. 'Concierge Medical Services' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it is excluded. For property coverage, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (Home Content)' matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage'; 'Home Office Protection (Business Equipment)' matches 'Home Office Protection' under property_enhancement_services; 'Golf Equipment Protection' is not in the ratings and is excluded. For travel coverage, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Base Travel)' matches 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan', and 'Premium Medical Network (Optional Add-on)' matches 'Premium Medical Network' under travel_enhancement_services. For additional services, 'Premium Insurance Membership' matches the same item under general_services. Only items with exact counterparts in the ratings are included; others are omitted.
